title: Taotaoju | Ready-to-Heat Breakfast Pastry Semi-finished Product for Kids
detail_text: Children's Favorite Children will love the delicious flavor of our rice cake, making it a great choice for parents looking for a healthy and tasty snack for their kids. Quick Heating Our rice cake is designed for quick heating, making it an ideal breakfast option for busy mornings or as a convenient snack. Perfect for Travel Our rice cake is perfect for travel, providing a tasty and convenient meal option when on the go. Authentic Cantonese Snack Experience the authentic taste of Cantonese cuisine with our Tai Tai Ju Xin Xin Rice Cake, a traditional breakfast item from Guangzhou. Easy to Prepare No need for complex preparation, our rice cake is a hassle-free option for those who want to enjoy a delicious meal without the hassle.

Children's Favorite

Quick Heating

Easy to Prepare



No need for complex preparation, our rice cake is a hassle-free option for those who want to enjoy a delicious meal without the hassle.

title: Ciweiagan | Filling Breakfast Pastry
detail_text: Authentic Chinese Snack Indulge in the authentic taste of Chinese cuisine with our unique hedgehog-shaped snack, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack. Variety of Flavors Experience a delightful mix of flavors with our assortment of nuts, milk bread, and crispy cracker treats. Ideal for Breakfast Start your day right with our energizing breakfast snack, offering a perfect blend of taste and nutrition. Nutritious and Delicious Enjoy the goodness of nuts and milk bread in every bite, making this snack both nutritious and delicious. Portable and Convenient Our snack is easy to carry and perfect for on-the-go snacking, making it an ideal choice for busy individuals.

title: 蛋黄酥面包Egg Yolk Pastry - Soft & Sweet (Healthy Breakfast, Family Snack, Soft Filling, All Ages)
detail_text: ✨ 【KEY BENEFITS】​ ✔️ Real Egg Yolk Filling​ - Rich & creamy taste ✔️ Layered Pastry Texture​ - Soft & fluffy layers ✔️ Large Packaging​ - Economical for whole family ✔️ Ready to Eat​ - Practical for quick breakfast 💖 WHY IT'S PERFECT FOR YOU?​ ✅ 1-Minute Breakfast​ - Quick & nutritious ✅ Healthy Snack​ - Better alternative to sweet cakes ✅ Unique Taste​ - Perfect sweet & salty balance ✅ All Ages Suitable​ - Children to elderly 🥮 PREMIUM INGREDIENTS:​ • Fresh egg yolks - Rich flavor • Premium flour - Soft texture • Pure butter - Natural aroma • Brown sugar - Moderate sweetness 🍵 HOW TO ENJOY:​ • Breakfast: With warm milk • Tea Time: With Chinese tea • School Lunch: For kids • Special Events: For guests 🎯 NUTRITIONAL BENEFITS:​ • Carbohydrate source • Quality protein • Instant energy • Less sugar 🌟 ADDITIONAL ADVANTAGES:​ • 7 days shelf life • Can be heated • Vegetarian suitable • Attractive packaging
detail_html:
✨ 【KEY BENEFITS】​
✔️ Real Egg Yolk Filling​ - Rich & creamy taste
✔️ Layered Pastry Texture​ - Soft & fluffy layers
✔️ Large Packaging​ - Economical for whole family
✔️ Ready to Eat​ - Practical for quick breakfast
💖 WHY IT'S PERFECT FOR YOU?​
✅ 1-Minute Breakfast​ - Quick & nutritious
✅ Healthy Snack​ - Better alternative to sweet cakes
✅ Unique Taste​ - Perfect sweet & salty balance
✅ All Ages Suitable​ - Children to elderly
🥮 PREMIUM INGREDIENTS:​
• Fresh egg yolks - Rich flavor
• Premium flour - Soft texture
• Pure butter - Natural aroma
• Brown sugar - Moderate sweetness
🍵 HOW TO ENJOY:​
• Breakfast: With warm milk
• Tea Time: With Chinese tea
• School Lunch: For kids
• Special Events: For guests
🎯 NUTRITIONAL BENEFITS:​
• Carbohydrate source
• Quality protein
• Instant energy
• Less sugar
🌟 ADDITIONAL ADVANTAGES:​
• 7 days shelf life
• Can be heated

title: eight zhen cake breakfast rice pastry heart healthy snacks
detail_text: Brand: Other Series: Five black cakes Origin: China, Anhui Province Packing type: canned Storage: sealed, moisture-proof, sun-proof, odor-proof, refrigeration recommended Shelf life: 90 days Product Details: 1. Tonifying spleen and removing dampness Eight Zhen cake is a kind of food processed with a variety of ingredients, including lentils, Gorgon Ferox seed, white yam and lotus seeds, etc., after eating can play the effect of tonifying spleen and removing dampness, can benefit qi and strong will, tonifying deficiency, tonifying stomach. 2. Delay aging Bazhen cake contains a variety of trace elements and natural antioxidant components, among which the content of selenium is high, can effectively remove free radicals in the body, improve the function of various organs, and play a role in delaying aging. Regular consumption can also regulate qi and blood, remove facial spots and acne, and make the skin tender and smooth. 3. Tonifying the kidney Baizhen cake raw materials Huai yam and Gorgon Ferox are Chinese herbs with the effect of tonifying the kidney, after eating Baizhen cake can tonify the kidney qi, the kidney deficiency caused by frequent urination, waist and leg pain have a relieving effect. detail_html:
Brand: Other

Series: Five black cakes

Origin: China, Anhui Province

Packing type: canned

Storage: sealed, moisture-proof, sun-proof, odor-proof, refrigeration recommended

Shelf life: 90 days

Product Details:

1. Tonifying spleen and removing dampness

Eight Zhen cake is a kind of food processed with a variety of ingredients, including lentils, Gorgon Ferox seed, white yam and lotus seeds, etc., after eating can play the effect of tonifying spleen and removing dampness, can benefit qi and strong will, tonifying deficiency, tonifying stomach.

2. Delay aging

Bazhen cake contains a variety of trace elements and natural antioxidant components, among which the content of selenium is high, can effectively remove free radicals in the body, improve the function of various organs, and play a role in delaying aging. Regular consumption can also regulate qi and blood, remove facial spots and acne, and make the skin tender and smooth.

3. Tonifying the kidney

Baizhen cake raw materials Huai yam and Gorgon Ferox are Chinese herbs with the effect of tonifying the kidney, after eating Baizhen cake can tonify the kidney qi, the kidney deficiency caused by frequent urination, waist and leg pain have a relieving effect.

Nutritional value

Bazhen cake not only contains rich protein, fat, vitamins, polysaccharides, carbohydrates, amylase, vitamin B1, vitamin B2, vitamin C, crude fiber, but also contains calcium, iron, zinc, manganese, potassium, magnesium and other nutritional elements, with tonifying spleen, removing dampness, beauty and other effects.

1、补脾祛湿

八珍糕是用多种食材加工成的一种食品，包括扁豆、芡实、怀山药和莲子等，食用以后能起到补脾祛湿的功效，可以益气强志、补虚损、补益肠胃。

2、延缓衰老

八珍糕含有多种微量元素和天然抗氧化成分，其中硒的含量较高，能有效清除体内的自由基，提高各器官功能，起到延缓衰老的作用。平时经常食用还能调理气血，祛除面部色斑和粉刺，让皮肤变得细嫩而光滑。

3、补肾

八珍糕原料淮山药和芡实都是具有补肾功效的中药材，食用八珍糕后能补益肾气，对肾虚引起的小便频繁、腰腿疼痛都有缓解作用。

营养价值

八珍糕不但含有丰富的蛋白质、脂肪、维生素、多糖、碳水化合物、淀粉酶 、维生素B1、维生素B2、维生素C、粗纤维，更含有钙、铁、锌、锰、钾、镁等营养元素，具有补脾祛湿、美容养颜等功效。

detail_text: The sweet potato cake, as a processed food derived from sweet potatoes, inherits many health benefits of sweet potatoes. The main effects and functions include: 1. Strengthening the spleen and stomach, promoting digestion The starch and dietary fiber in the sweet potato cake help stimulate intestinal peristalsis, improve digestive function, and alleviate symptoms such as weak spleen and stomach, indigestion, and abdominal distension caused by indigestion. 2. Supplementing nutrition, enhancing physical fitness It is rich in protein, carbohydrates, B vitamins, vitamin C, calcium, phosphorus, iron, potassium, magnesium, and other minerals. It can provide energy and essential nutrients for the body, helping to enhance physical fitness. 3. Regulating blood sugar, assisting in blood sugar control The glycemic index of sweet potatoes is relatively low, and they are rich in resistant starch and dietary fiber. They can slow down the absorption of glucose, which is helpful for stabilizing post-meal blood sugar. It is suitable for people with diabetes or those who need to control blood sugar to consume in moderation. 4. Moisturizing the intestines, promoting detoxification and beautifying the skin The abundant dietary fiber in it can stimulate intestinal peristalsis, increase the volume of feces, soften the stool, effectively alleviate constipation, promote the elimination of internal toxins, and at the same time, antioxidant components such as vitamin E help eliminate free radicals and delay skin aging, achieving the effect of beauty and rejuvenation. 5. Enhancing immunity The natural polysaccharides, vitamin C, and polyphenols in sweet potatoes can increase the activity of immune cells, help eliminate free radicals, and thereby enhance the body's defense ability. 香芋饼作为香芋的加工食品，继承了香芋的多种健康益处，主要有以下功效与作用： 1. 健脾益胃，促进消化‌ 香芋饼中的淀粉和膳食纤维有助于促进胃肠蠕动，改善消化功能，缓解脾胃虚弱、消化不良、积食腹胀等症状‌ 2. 补充营养，增强体质‌ 它富含蛋白质、碳水化合物、维生素B族、维生素C、钙、磷、铁、钾、镁等多种矿物质，能为人体提供能量和必需营养素，有助于增强体质‌ 3. 调节血糖，辅助控糖‌ 香芋的升糖指数相对较低，且富含抗性淀粉和膳食纤维，能延缓葡萄糖吸收速度，对稳定餐后血糖有一定帮助，适合糖尿病患者或需要控制血糖的人群适量食用‌ 4. 润肠通便，排毒养颜‌ 其丰富的膳食纤维能刺激肠道蠕动，增加粪便体积，软化大便，有效改善便秘，促进体内毒素排出，同时维生素E等抗氧化成分有助于清除自由基，延缓皮肤衰老，达到美容养颜的效果‌ 5. 增强免疫力‌ 香芋中的天然多聚糖、维生素C和多酚类物质能提高免疫细胞活性，帮助清除自由基，从而增强机体防御能力‌
detail_html:
The sweet potato cake, as a processed food derived from sweet potatoes, inherits many health benefits of sweet potatoes. The main effects and functions include:

1. Strengthening the spleen and stomach, promoting digestion

The starch and dietary fiber in the sweet potato cake help stimulate intestinal peristalsis, improve digestive function, and alleviate symptoms such as weak spleen and stomach, indigestion, and abdominal distension caused by indigestion.

2. Supplementing nutrition, enhancing physical fitness

It is rich in protein, carbohydrates, B vitamins, vitamin C, calcium, phosphorus, iron, potassium, magnesium, and other minerals. It can provide energy and essential nutrients for the body, helping to enhance physical fitness.

3. Regulating blood sugar, assisting in blood sugar control

The glycemic index of sweet potatoes is relatively low, and they are rich in resistant starch and dietary fiber. They can slow down the absorption of glucose, which is helpful for stabilizing post-meal blood sugar. It is suitable for people with diabetes or those who need to control blood sugar to consume in moderation.

4. Moisturizing the intestines, promoting detoxification and beautifying the skin

The abundant dietary fiber in it can stimulate intestinal peristalsis, increase the volume of feces, soften the stool, effectively alleviate constipation, promote the elimination of internal toxins, and at the same time, antioxidant components such as vitamin E help eliminate free radicals and delay skin aging, achieving the effect of beauty and rejuvenation.

5. Enhancing immunity

The natural polysaccharides, vitamin C, and polyphenols in sweet potatoes can increase the activity of immune cells, help eliminate free radicals, and thereby enhance the body's defense ability.

香芋饼作为香芋的加工食品，继承了香芋的多种健康益处，主要有以下功效与作用：

1. 健脾益胃，促进消化‌

香芋饼中的淀粉和膳食纤维有助于促进胃肠蠕动，改善消化功能，缓解脾胃虚弱、消化不良、积食腹胀等症状‌

2. 补充营养，增强体质‌

它富含蛋白质、碳水化合物、维生素B族、维生素C、钙、磷、铁、钾、镁等多种矿物质，能为人体提供能量和必需营养素，有助于增强体质‌

3. 调节血糖，辅助控糖‌

香芋的升糖指数相对较低，且富含抗性淀粉和膳食纤维，能延缓葡萄糖吸收速度，对稳定餐后血糖有一定帮助，适合糖尿病患者或需要控制血糖的人群适量食用‌

4. 润肠通便，排毒养颜‌

其丰富的膳食纤维能刺激肠道蠕动，增加粪便体积，软化大便，有效改善便秘，促进体内毒素排出，同时维生素E等抗氧化成分有助于清除自由基，延缓皮肤衰老，达到美容养颜的效果‌

5. 增强免疫力‌

香芋中的天然多聚糖、维生素C和多酚类物质能提高免疫细胞活性，帮助清除自由基，从而增强机体防御能力‌

Enhancing immunityThe natural polysaccharides, vitamin C, and polyphenols in sweet potatoes can increase the activity of immune cells, help eliminate free radicals, and thereby enhance the body's defense ability.香芋饼作为香芋的加工食品，继承了香芋的多种健康益处，主要有以下功效与作用：1. 健脾益胃，促进消化‌香芋饼中的淀粉和膳食纤维有助于促进胃肠蠕动，改善消化功能，缓解脾胃虚弱、消化不良、积食腹胀等症状‌2. 补充营养，增强体质‌它富含蛋白质、碳水化合物、维生素B族、维生素C、钙、磷、铁、钾、镁等多种矿物质，能为人体提供能量和必需营养素，有助于增强体质‌3. 调节血糖，辅助控糖‌香芋的升糖指数相对较低，且富含抗性淀粉和膳食纤维，能延缓葡萄糖吸收速度，对稳定餐后血糖有一定帮助，适合糖尿病患者或需要控制血糖的人群适量食用‌4. 润肠通便，排毒养颜‌其丰富的膳食纤维能刺激肠道蠕动，增加粪便体积，软化大便，有效改善便秘，促进体内毒素排出，同时维生素E等抗氧化成分有助于清除自由基，延缓皮肤衰老，达到美容养颜的效果‌5. 增强免疫力‌香芋中的天然多聚糖、维生素C和多酚类物质能提高免疫细胞活性，帮助清除自由基，从而增强机体防御能力‌

title: GUANGMANZHI | Old Fashioned Red Bean Paste Filled Bagel Breakfast Pastry Convenience Snack
detail_text: Easy to Eat With their convenient ring shape, these bread rings are easy to eat and enjoy on the go. Quick and Convenient Ideal for busy individuals, these bread rings provide a quick and convenient meal or snack option. Breakfast or Snack Option Perfect for breakfast or a quick snack, these bread rings offer a satisfying meal or treat anytime of the day. Sweet Red Bean Paste Filling The sweet red bean paste filling adds a unique and delightful flavor to these classic bread rings. Traditional Danish Pastry Indulge in the classic taste of traditional Danish pastry with our delicious bread rings filled with sweet red bean paste.

page_json.description: Easy to EatWith their convenient ring shape, these bread rings are easy to eat and enjoy on the go.Quick and ConvenientIdeal for busy individuals, these bread rings provide a quick and convenient meal or snack option.Breakfast or Snack OptionPerfect for breakfast or a quick snack, these bread rings offer a satisfying meal or treat anytime of the day.Sweet Red Bean Paste FillingThe sweet red bean paste filling adds a unique and delightful flavor to these classic bread rings.Traditional Danish PastryIndulge in the classic taste of traditional Danish pastry with our delicious bread rings filled with sweet red bean paste.<html> <head></head> <body> Easy to Eat  With their convenient ring shape, these bread rings are easy to eat and enjoy on the go.  Quick and Convenient  Ideal for busy individuals, these bread rings provide a quick and convenient meal or snack option.  Breakfast or Snack Option  Perfect for breakfast or a quick snack, these bread rings offer a satisfying meal or treat anytime of the day.  Sweet Red Bean Paste Filling  The sweet red bean paste filling adds a unique and delightful flavor to these classic bread rings.  Traditional Danish Pastry  Indulge in the classic taste of traditional Danish pastry with our delicious bread rings filled with sweet red bean paste.   </body></html>

title: Milk Fragrant Buns Classic Flavor Nutritious Breakfast Pastry
detail_text: Student-Friendly Our Mini Buns are an ideal choice for students, providing a quick and easy snack on the go. Instant Consumption Enjoy instant satisfaction with our ready-to-eat Mini Buns, no preparation required. Nutritious Snack Not just a treat, our Mini Buns are a nutritious snack, packed with essential nutrients for your daily diet. Classic Western Pastry Experience the classic taste of Western pastry with our Milk Fragrance Mini Buns, perfect for a nutritious breakfast or snack. Rich Milk Flavor Indulge in the rich milk flavor of our Mini Buns, a delightful treat for any time of day.
detail_html:
Student-Friendly



Our Mini Buns are an ideal choice for students, providing a quick and easy snack on the go.






Instant Consumption



Enjoy instant satisfaction with our ready-to-eat Mini Buns, no preparation required.






Nutritious Snack



Not just a treat, our Mini Buns are a nutritious snack, packed with essential nutrients for your daily diet.






Classic Western Pastry



Experience the classic taste of Western pastry with our Milk Fragrance Mini Buns, perfect for a nutritious breakfast or snack.






Rich Milk Flavor



Indulge in the rich milk flavor of our Mini Buns, a delightful treat for any time of day.

title: WENXIANGZAN | Preserved Vegetable Pork Flavor Breakfast Pastry
detail_text: Ready-to-Eat Enjoy a delicious meal anytime with our ready-to-eat Pork Belly Pie. No cooking required, just heat and serve. High-Quality Ingredients Made with high-quality pork belly and authentic Plum Sauce, our Pork Belly Pie is a treat for your taste buds. Versatile Dish Whether you're looking for a snack, a quick lunch, or a hearty breakfast, our Pork Belly Pie is a versatile choice. Convenient Packaging Our Pork Belly Pie comes in convenient packaging, making it perfect for on-the-go eating or quick breakfasts. Easy to Store Our Pork Belly Pie is easy to store, making it a great addition to your pantry for whenever you need a quick and satisfying meal.

Ready-to-Eat



Enjoy a delicious meal anytime with our ready-to-eat Pork Belly Pie. No cooking required, just heat and serve.






High-Quality Ingredients



Made with high-quality pork belly and authentic Plum Sauce, our Pork Belly Pie is a treat for your taste buds.






Versatile Dish



Whether you're looking for a snack, a quick lunch, or a hearty breakfast, our Pork Belly Pie is a versatile choice.






Convenient Packaging



Our Pork Belly Pie comes in convenient packaging, making it perfect for on-the-go eating or quick breakfasts.






Easy to Store



Our Pork Belly Pie is easy to store, making it a great addition to your pantry for whenever you need a quick and satisfying meal.

page_json.description: <html> <head></head> <body>  Ready-to-Eat   Enjoy a delicious meal anytime with our ready-to-eat Pork Belly Pie. No cooking required, just heat and serve.    High-Quality Ingredients   Made with high-quality pork belly and authentic Plum Sauce, our Pork Belly Pie is a treat for your taste buds.    Versatile Dish   Whether you're looking for a snack, a quick lunch, or a hearty breakfast, our Pork Belly Pie is a versatile choice.    Convenient Packaging   Our Pork Belly Pie comes in convenient packaging, making it perfect for on-the-go eating or quick breakfasts.    Easy to Store   Our Pork Belly Pie is easy to store, making it a great addition to your pantry for whenever you need a quick and satisfying meal.     </body></html>

title: Pineapple and durian pastries, traditional pastries, breakfast snacks, and local specialties 凤梨酥榴莲酥传统糕点早餐休闲零食特产小吃
detail_text: Pineapple cakes have the effects and functions of relieving fatigue, replenishing energy, promoting digestion, improving constipation and assisting in weight loss. However, as food, it should be consumed in moderation. If you need to eat it for a long time or are allergic to certain ingredients, you should consult a doctor or a nutritionist. Relieve fatigue The B vitamins and mineral magnesium contained in pineapple cakes can participate in the body's metabolic process and improve the efficiency of energy metabolism. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can provide the body with necessary nutrients, thereby playing a role in relieving fatigue. 2. Replenish energy The carbohydrates in pineapple cakes are the main source of energy for the human body. After intake, they will be broken down into glucose and absorbed and utilized by the body. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can replenish energy in a timely manner and maintain a stable blood sugar level to achieve the purpose of replenishing energy. 3. Promote digestion Pineapple cakes contain a certain amount of dietary fiber, which cannot be digested by the digestive juices of the gastrointestinal tract and is insoluble in water. Therefore, it can stimulate the peristalsis of the gastrointestinal tract to a certain extent. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can help expel food residues from the body, thereby promoting digestion. 4. Improve constipation The dietary fiber in pineapple cakes has water absorption properties, which can increase the volume of feces and soften them, making them easier to pass. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can promote intestinal movement by mechanically stimulating the intestinal wall, thereby achieving the effect of improving constipation. 凤梨酥具有缓解疲劳、补充能量、促进消化、改善便秘、辅助减肥的功效与作用。但是作为食物，食用时需适量，若需要长期食用或对某些食材过敏，则应咨询医生或营养师。 1.缓解疲劳 凤梨酥中含有的维生素B族和矿物质镁可以参与体内新陈代谢过程，提高能量代谢效率。适量食用凤梨酥可为身体提供必要的营养物质，从而起到缓解疲劳的作用。 2.补充能量 凤梨酥中的碳水化合物是人体主要的能量来源，在摄入后会被分解成葡萄糖被机体吸收利用。适当食用凤梨酥能够及时补充体力、维持血糖稳定状态以达到补充能量的目的。 3.促进消化 凤梨酥中含有一定量的膳食纤维，其既不能被胃肠道消化液所消化，也不溶于水，因此能够在一定程度上刺激胃肠蠕动。适量食用凤梨酥有助于食物残渣排出体外，进而起到促进消化的作用。 4.改善便秘 凤梨酥中的膳食纤维具有吸水性，能增加粪便体积并软化大便，使其易于排出。适当食用凤梨酥可通过机械刺激肠壁来促进肠道运动，进而达到改善便秘的效果。
detail_html:
Pineapple cakes have the effects and functions of relieving fatigue, replenishing energy, promoting digestion, improving constipation and assisting in weight loss. However, as food, it should be consumed in moderation. If you need to eat it for a long time or are allergic to certain ingredients, you should consult a doctor or a nutritionist.

Relieve fatigue

The B vitamins and mineral magnesium contained in pineapple cakes can participate in the body's metabolic process and improve the efficiency of energy metabolism. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can provide the body with necessary nutrients, thereby playing a role in relieving fatigue.

2. Replenish energy

The carbohydrates in pineapple cakes are the main source of energy for the human body. After intake, they will be broken down into glucose and absorbed and utilized by the body. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can replenish energy in a timely manner and maintain a stable blood sugar level to achieve the purpose of replenishing energy.

3. Promote digestion

Pineapple cakes contain a certain amount of dietary fiber, which cannot be digested by the digestive juices of the gastrointestinal tract and is insoluble in water. Therefore, it can stimulate the peristalsis of the gastrointestinal tract to a certain extent. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can help expel food residues from the body, thereby promoting digestion.

4. Improve constipation

The dietary fiber in pineapple cakes has water absorption properties, which can increase the volume of feces and soften them, making them easier to pass. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can promote intestinal movement by mechanically stimulating the intestinal wall, thereby achieving the effect of improving constipation.

凤梨酥具有缓解疲劳、补充能量、促进消化、改善便秘、辅助减肥的功效与作用。但是作为食物，食用时需适量，若需要长期食用或对某些食材过敏，则应咨询医生或营养师。

1.缓解疲劳

凤梨酥中含有的维生素B族和矿物质镁可以参与体内新陈代谢过程，提高能量代谢效率。适量食用凤梨酥可为身体提供必要的营养物质，从而起到缓解疲劳的作用。

2.补充能量

凤梨酥中的碳水化合物是人体主要的能量来源，在摄入后会被分解成葡萄糖被机体吸收利用。适当食用凤梨酥能够及时补充体力、维持血糖稳定状态以达到补充能量的目的。

3.促进消化

凤梨酥中含有一定量的膳食纤维，其既不能被胃肠道消化液所消化，也不溶于水，因此能够在一定程度上刺激胃肠蠕动。适量食用凤梨酥有助于食物残渣排出体外，进而起到促进消化的作用。

4.改善便秘

凤梨酥中的膳食纤维具有吸水性，能增加粪便体积并软化大便，使其易于排出。适当食用凤梨酥可通过机械刺激肠壁来促进肠道运动，进而达到改善便秘的效果。

product.desc:
Pineapple cakes have the effects and functions of relieving fatigue, replenishing energy, promoting digestion, improving constipation and assisting in weight loss. However, as food, it should be consumed in moderation. If you need to eat it for a long time or are allergic to certain ingredients, you should consult a doctor or a nutritionist.

Relieve fatigue

The B vitamins and mineral magnesium contained in pineapple cakes can participate in the body's metabolic process and improve the efficiency of energy metabolism. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can provide the body with necessary nutrients, thereby playing a role in relieving fatigue.

2. Replenish energy

The carbohydrates in pineapple cakes are the main source of energy for the human body. After intake, they will be broken down into glucose and absorbed and utilized by the body. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can replenish energy in a timely manner and maintain a stable blood sugar level to achieve the purpose of replenishing energy.

3. Promote digestion

Pineapple cakes contain a certain amount of dietary fiber, which cannot be digested by the digestive juices of the gastrointestinal tract and is insoluble in water. Therefore, it can stimulate the peristalsis of the gastrointestinal tract to a certain extent. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can help expel food residues from the body, thereby promoting digestion.

4. Improve constipation

The dietary fiber in pineapple cakes has water absorption properties, which can increase the volume of feces and soften them, making them easier to pass. Eating pineapple cakes in moderation can promote intestinal movement by mechanically stimulating the intestinal wall, thereby achieving the effect of improving constipation.

凤梨酥具有缓解疲劳、补充能量、促进消化、改善便秘、辅助减肥的功效与作用。但是作为食物，食用时需适量，若需要长期食用或对某些食材过敏，则应咨询医生或营养师。

1.缓解疲劳

凤梨酥中含有的维生素B族和矿物质镁可以参与体内新陈代谢过程，提高能量代谢效率。适量食用凤梨酥可为身体提供必要的营养物质，从而起到缓解疲劳的作用。

2.补充能量

凤梨酥中的碳水化合物是人体主要的能量来源，在摄入后会被分解成葡萄糖被机体吸收利用。适当食用凤梨酥能够及时补充体力、维持血糖稳定状态以达到补充能量的目的。

3.促进消化

凤梨酥中含有一定量的膳食纤维，其既不能被胃肠道消化液所消化，也不溶于水，因此能够在一定程度上刺激胃肠蠕动。适量食用凤梨酥有助于食物残渣排出体外，进而起到促进消化的作用。

4.改善便秘

凤梨酥中的膳食纤维具有吸水性，能增加粪便体积并软化大便，使其易于排出。适当食用凤梨酥可通过机械刺激肠壁来促进肠道运动，进而达到改善便秘的效果。

title: Durian cake snack leisure food traditional pastry breakfast individual packaging food 榴莲饼零食休闲小吃传统糕点早餐独立包装食品
detail_text: Durian cakes have the following benefits and functions: 1. Energy supplementation Durian cakes contain abundant carbohydrates and fats. After oxidation in the body, these substances can generate energy and provide fuel for physical activities. 2. Calorie provision Due to the high content of fat and sugar in durian cakes, when consumed, they can be converted into heat energy in the body, helping to raise body temperature and resist cold. 3. Appetite enhancement The unique smell and taste of durian cakes can stimulate the taste nerve, thereby increasing saliva secretion, achieving the effect of enhancing appetite. 4. Digestion promotion The dietary fiber in durian cakes can promote intestinal peristalsis, improve constipation conditions, and help with the digestion and absorption of food. 5. Anemia improvement The iron element in durian cakes can help synthesize hemoglobin, and hemoglobin has the function of carrying oxygen. Therefore, consuming durian cakes in moderation can help prevent and treat iron deficiency anemia to some extent. 榴莲饼具有补充能量、提供热量、增强食欲、促进消化、改善贫血等功效和作用。 1.补充能量 榴莲饼中含有丰富的碳水化合物和脂肪，这些物质在体内氧化后可产生能量，为身体活动提供燃料。 2.提供热量 由于榴莲饼中的脂肪和糖分含量较高，摄入后可在体内转化为热能，起到提高体温、抵御寒冷的作用。 3.增强食欲 榴莲饼独特的气味和口感能够刺激味觉神经，从而引起唾液分泌增加，达到增进食欲的效果。 4.促进消化 榴莲饼中所含有的膳食纤维可以促进肠道蠕动，改善便秘情况，并且有助于食物的消化吸收。 5.改善贫血 榴莲饼中的铁元素可以帮助合成血红蛋白，而血红素具有携带氧气的功能，因此适量食用榴莲饼对预防和治疗缺铁性贫血有一定的帮助。
detail_html:
Durian cakes have the following benefits and functions:

1. Energy supplementation

Durian cakes contain abundant carbohydrates and fats. After oxidation in the body, these substances can generate energy and provide fuel for physical activities.

2. Calorie provision

Due to the high content of fat and sugar in durian cakes, when consumed, they can be converted into heat energy in the body, helping to raise body temperature and resist cold.

3. Appetite enhancement

The unique smell and taste of durian cakes can stimulate the taste nerve, thereby increasing saliva secretion, achieving the effect of enhancing appetite.

4. Digestion promotion

The dietary fiber in durian cakes can promote intestinal peristalsis, improve constipation conditions, and help with the digestion and absorption of food.

5. Anemia improvement

The iron element in durian cakes can help synthesize hemoglobin, and hemoglobin has the function of carrying oxygen. Therefore, consuming durian cakes in moderation can help prevent and treat iron deficiency anemia to some extent.

榴莲饼具有补充能量、提供热量、增强食欲、促进消化、改善贫血等功效和作用。

1.补充能量

榴莲饼中含有丰富的碳水化合物和脂肪，这些物质在体内氧化后可产生能量，为身体活动提供燃料。

2.提供热量

由于榴莲饼中的脂肪和糖分含量较高，摄入后可在体内转化为热能，起到提高体温、抵御寒冷的作用。

3.增强食欲

榴莲饼独特的气味和口感能够刺激味觉神经，从而引起唾液分泌增加，达到增进食欲的效果。

4.促进消化

榴莲饼中所含有的膳食纤维可以促进肠道蠕动，改善便秘情况，并且有助于食物的消化吸收。

5.改善贫血

榴莲饼中的铁元素可以帮助合成血红蛋白，而血红素具有携带氧气的功能，因此适量食用榴莲饼对预防和治疗缺铁性贫血有一定的帮助。

title: Three Squirrels | Nutritious Healthy Breakfast Pastry 300g
detail_text: Delicious Dessert Indulge in the delightful taste of our Osmanthus Lotus Cake, a perfect dessert that satisfies your sweet tooth without compromising on health. Perfect for Snacking Whether you're at home or on the go, our Osmanthus Lotus Cake is the perfect snack to satiate your hunger cravings. Rich in Nutrients Our Osmanthus Lotus Cake is not just tasty but also rich in nutrients, making it a healthy choice for snack lovers. Authentic Chinese Flavor Experience the authentic taste of traditional Chinese cuisine with our Three Squirrels Osmanthus Lotus Cake, a perfect blend of sweet and savory flavors. Convenient Packaging Our Osmanthus Lotus Cake comes in a convenient 300g package, making it easy to carry and enjoy anytime, anywhere.
detail_html:
Delicious Dessert



Indulge in the delightful taste of our Osmanthus Lotus Cake, a perfect dessert that satisfies your sweet tooth without compromising on health.






Perfect for Snacking



Whether you're at home or on the go, our Osmanthus Lotus Cake is the perfect snack to satiate your hunger cravings.






Rich in Nutrients



Our Osmanthus Lotus Cake is not just tasty but also rich in nutrients, making it a healthy choice for snack lovers.






Authentic Chinese Flavor



Experience the authentic taste of traditional Chinese cuisine with our Three Squirrels Osmanthus Lotus Cake, a perfect blend of sweet and savory flavors.






Convenient Packaging



Our Osmanthus Lotus Cake comes in a convenient 300g package, making it easy to carry and enjoy anytime, anywhere.

title: Sugar-free quinoa Sachima, breakfast meal replacement, sugar-free staple food, healthy snack, coarse grain pastry 无糖藜麦 沙琪玛 早餐代餐无糖主食健康小零食粗粮点心
detail_text: The main function of sugar-free sarsiki is to provide the body with quick energy. Its nutritional value mainly lies in the supplementation of carbohydrates and fats. It uses artificial sweeteners (such as maltitol, erythritol, etc.) instead of sucrose, having a relatively small impact on blood sugar, and is suitable for people who need to control sugar intake. Core functions: 1. Rapid energy supply Rich in carbohydrates and fats, which can be quickly absorbed by the body and converted into energy to maintain normal body functions. 2. Sugar control alternative The sugar-free formula uses artificial sweeteners, with a lower glycemic index, and diabetic patients can consume a small amount, but they need to monitor the blood sugar response. 3. Nutrient supplementation Contains high-quality wheat flour, eggs and other raw materials, providing protein, vitamins and other nutrients. 无蔗糖沙琪玛的主要作用是为人体提供快速能量，其营养价值主要体现在碳水化合物和脂肪的补充上。它使用代糖（如麦芽糖醇、赤藓糖醇等）替代蔗糖，对血糖影响较小，适合需要控制糖分摄入的人群 核心作用 1.快速供能 富含碳水化合物和脂肪，能迅速被人体吸收转化为能量，维持身体正常运作 2.控糖替代 无蔗糖配方使用代糖，升糖指数较低，糖尿病患者可少量食用，但需监测血糖反应 3.营养补充 含优质小麦粉、鸡蛋等原料，提供蛋白质、维生素等营养成分
detail_html:
The main function of sugar-free sarsiki is to provide the body with quick energy. Its nutritional value mainly lies in the supplementation of carbohydrates and fats. It uses artificial sweeteners (such as maltitol, erythritol, etc.) instead of sucrose, having a relatively small impact on blood sugar, and is suitable for people who need to control sugar intake.

Core functions:

1. Rapid energy supply

Rich in carbohydrates and fats, which can be quickly absorbed by the body and converted into energy to maintain normal body functions.

2. Sugar control alternative

The sugar-free formula uses artificial sweeteners, with a lower glycemic index, and diabetic patients can consume a small amount, but they need to monitor the blood sugar response.

3. Nutrient supplementation

Contains high-quality wheat flour, eggs and other raw materials, providing protein, vitamins and other nutrients.

无蔗糖沙琪玛的主要作用是为人体提供快速能量，其营养价值主要体现在碳水化合物和脂肪的补充上。它使用代糖（如麦芽糖醇、赤藓糖醇等）替代蔗糖，对血糖影响较小，适合需要控制糖分摄入的人群

核心作用

1.快速供能

富含碳水化合物和脂肪，能迅速被人体吸收转化为能量，维持身体正常运作

2.控糖替代

无蔗糖配方使用代糖，升糖指数较低，糖尿病患者可少量食用，但需监测血糖反应

3.营养补充

含优质小麦粉、鸡蛋等原料，提供蛋白质、维生素等营养成分

product.desc:
The main function of sugar-free sarsiki is to provide the body with quick energy. Its nutritional value mainly lies in the supplementation of carbohydrates and fats. It uses artificial sweeteners (such as maltitol, erythritol, etc.) instead of sucrose, having a relatively small impact on blood sugar, and is suitable for people who need to control sugar intake.

Core functions:

1. Rapid energy supply

Rich in carbohydrates and fats, which can be quickly absorbed by the body and converted into energy to maintain normal body functions.

2. Sugar control alternative

The sugar-free formula uses artificial sweeteners, with a lower glycemic index, and diabetic patients can consume a small amount, but they need to monitor the blood sugar response.

3. Nutrient supplementation

Contains high-quality wheat flour, eggs and other raw materials, providing protein, vitamins and other nutrients.

无蔗糖沙琪玛的主要作用是为人体提供快速能量，其营养价值主要体现在碳水化合物和脂肪的补充上。它使用代糖（如麦芽糖醇、赤藓糖醇等）替代蔗糖，对血糖影响较小，适合需要控制糖分摄入的人群

核心作用

1.快速供能

富含碳水化合物和脂肪，能迅速被人体吸收转化为能量，维持身体正常运作

2.控糖替代

无蔗糖配方使用代糖，升糖指数较低，糖尿病患者可少量食用，但需监测血糖反应

3.营养补充

含优质小麦粉、鸡蛋等原料，提供蛋白质、维生素等营养成分

product.desc:
High-Quality Ingredients



Made with high-quality ingredients, our Pineapple Tart ensures a delicious and satisfying taste every time.






Convenient Packaging



Our Pineapple Tart comes in a convenient iron box, making it easy to store and transport.






Authentic Flavor



Experience the authentic taste of Fujian Xiamen with our Pineapple Tart, a traditional Chinese snack that embodies local flavor.






Classic Breakfast Option



Perfect for your morning routine, our Pineapple Tart is a classic breakfast choice that provides a delightful start to your day.






Traditional Chinese Dessert



As a traditional Chinese dessert, our Pineapple Tart offers a unique and authentic culinary experience.

title: Ant Snacks Cat Mountain King Durian Cake - Authentic Silky Durian Pastry for Breakfast Meal Replacement 猫山王榴莲饼正宗流心榴莲酥早餐代餐
detail_text: Durian cakes have the following benefits and effects: 1. Supplementing energy Durian cakes contain abundant carbohydrates and fats. After oxidation in the body, these substances can generate energy and provide fuel for physical activities. 2. Providing calories Because durian cakes have a high content of fat and sugar, when consumed, they can be converted into heat energy in the body, helping to raise body temperature and resist the cold. 3. Enhancing appetite The unique smell and taste of durian cakes can stimulate the taste nerve, thereby increasing saliva secretion and achieving the effect of enhancing appetite. 4. Promoting digestion The dietary fiber in durian cakes can promote intestinal peristalsis, improve constipation conditions, and help with the digestion and absorption of food. 5. Improving anemia The iron element in durian cakes can help synthesize hemoglobin, and hemoglobin has the function of carrying oxygen. Therefore, consuming durian cakes in moderation can help prevent and treat iron deficiency anemia to some extent. 榴莲饼具有补充能量、提供热量、增强食欲、促进消化、改善贫血等功效和作用。 1.补充能量 榴莲饼中含有丰富的碳水化合物和脂肪，这些物质在体内氧化后可产生能量，为身体活动提供燃料。 2.提供热量 由于榴莲饼中的脂肪和糖分含量较高，摄入后可在体内转化为热能，起到提高体温、抵御寒冷的作用。 3.增强食欲 榴莲饼独特的气味和口感能够刺激味觉神经，从而引起唾液分泌增加，达到增进食欲的效果。 4.促进消化 榴莲饼中所含有的膳食纤维可以促进肠道蠕动，改善便秘情况，并且有助于食物的消化吸收。 5.改善贫血 榴莲饼中的铁元素可以帮助合成血红蛋白，而血红素具有携带氧气的功能，因此适量食用榴莲饼对预防和治疗缺铁性贫血有一定的帮助。
detail_html:
Durian cakes have the following benefits and effects:

1. Supplementing energy

Durian cakes contain abundant carbohydrates and fats. After oxidation in the body, these substances can generate energy and provide fuel for physical activities.

2. Providing calories

Because durian cakes have a high content of fat and sugar, when consumed, they can be converted into heat energy in the body, helping to raise body temperature and resist the cold.

3. Enhancing appetite

The unique smell and taste of durian cakes can stimulate the taste nerve, thereby increasing saliva secretion and achieving the effect of enhancing appetite.

4. Promoting digestion

The dietary fiber in durian cakes can promote intestinal peristalsis, improve constipation conditions, and help with the digestion and absorption of food.

5. Improving anemia

The iron element in durian cakes can help synthesize hemoglobin, and hemoglobin has the function of carrying oxygen. Therefore, consuming durian cakes in moderation can help prevent and treat iron deficiency anemia to some extent.

榴莲饼具有补充能量、提供热量、增强食欲、促进消化、改善贫血等功效和作用。

1.补充能量

榴莲饼中含有丰富的碳水化合物和脂肪，这些物质在体内氧化后可产生能量，为身体活动提供燃料。

2.提供热量

由于榴莲饼中的脂肪和糖分含量较高，摄入后可在体内转化为热能，起到提高体温、抵御寒冷的作用。

3.增强食欲

榴莲饼独特的气味和口感能够刺激味觉神经，从而引起唾液分泌增加，达到增进食欲的效果。

4.促进消化

榴莲饼中所含有的膳食纤维可以促进肠道蠕动，改善便秘情况，并且有助于食物的消化吸收。

5.改善贫血

榴莲饼中的铁元素可以帮助合成血红蛋白，而血红素具有携带氧气的功能，因此适量食用榴莲饼对预防和治疗缺铁性贫血有一定的帮助。
